insights: MARGIN PROFILE

Pre-construction · $0 billed against $11,007 sunk design cost = -$11,007 carrying loss. Forecast 24% margin once Ravenna accepts Nov 19 2025 BID and field work mobilizes (industry benchmark for new owner-GC relationship).
VENDOR CONCENTRATION
Franklin Engineering (OWP design-build MEP) = $10,701 (100% of $11,007 AP) across 2 design invoices. Only 1 AP vendor active — design-only phase has not yet engaged supply houses.
CREW PROFILE
2 OWP estimators logged 3.0 hours YTD: Jeffrey Gerard 2.0 hrs + Jordan Gerard 1.0 hr (takeoff). $197 labor base — virtually all takeoff/refinement work in design phase.
ROUGHIN DOMINANCE
Code 120 Roughin Labor = 0 hrs / $0 actual (pre-mobilization). Code 101 Takeoff & Purchase Labor = 3.0 hrs / $197 — the only OWP labor activity to date.
BUDGET DELIVERY
Final BID Nov 19 2025 = $1,948,000 (104 units · $18,731/unit · $4,584/trim fixture). 23-month bid pursuit since Dec 2023: 122u/$2.61M → 100u/$2.10M → 104u/$1.95M (-25% net).
CONTRACT GROWTH

Bid trajectory: $2,610,000 (Dec 15 2023 1st Budget · Blueprint GC) → $2,100,000 (Oct 17 2024 2nd Budget Blueprint · -19.5%) → $1,948,000 (Nov 19 2025 FINAL Ravenna Partners · -7.2%). Net -$662k (-25.4%) and -18 units across 3 bids.
BURDEN RATIO
Burden codes 995 + 998 = $109 on $197 labor base = 55.3%. Slightly above OWP's typical 48-50% — design-phase labor with no field crew yet skews ratio.
PROJECT SCALE

104 units · 425 trim fixtures (verified Nov 19 2025 bid sheet) = 4.09 fixtures/unit. 535 RI fixtures · 705 permit fixtures. Revenue/unit $0 (pre-billing), hours/unit 0.03 takeoff. Ravenna Partners' 1st OWP engagement.
PRODUCTIVITY
Blended labor rate $65.67/hr in design phase. Revenue/hour $0 (pre-billing). Profit/hour $-3,669 (carrying loss on tiny labor base). Field productivity benchmarks pending Ravenna acceptance.
CO PROFILE
0 executed COs (pre-construction). Bid revisions across 3 budget rounds (Dec 2023 → Nov 2025) not classified as COs. CO pipeline opens upon Ravenna acceptance.
FIXTURE DENSITY

425 trim fixtures ÷ 104 units = 4.09 fixtures/unit (verified Ravenna bid sheet 3rd Budget Nov 19 2025 + proposal RESIDENT UNIT TRIM): 104 toilets (98+6 ADA Gerber) + 104 lavs (Kohler K-2035-1 + matte black Peerless) + 53 tubs (47+6 ADA Sterling Vikrell) + 51 showers (Sterling 95077) + 104 kitchen sinks (Peerless P7946LF-BL) + 4 common (2 Toto WC + 2 Kohler lav) + 2 amenity sinks + 1 mop + 1 drinking fountain + 1 coffee. Plus 106 dishwasher RI + 104 icemaker RI + 104 washer RI + 104 condensate drains + 208 water spacer tubes.
NEW GC SIGNAL · OWNER-GC

First OWP engagement with Ravenna Partners (owner-GC pattern · self-developing). Initial budget rounds Dec 2023 + Oct 2024 listed Blueprint as GC; Ravenna took over for Nov 2025 final bid. Owner-GC posture (lean PM, price-sensitive, schedule-focused) is unfamiliar territory for OWP — no closed-job baseline.
DESIGN-TEAM POSTURE

Architect TBD per Master Project List (drawings published as 'Building Permit Plans' Nov 2025). MEP Franklin Engineering is OWP design-build partner ($10,701 design fees, ~0.55% of bid value · standard pre-permit ratio).
